series_title.ja: 年上幼馴染と再会したら、姉妹で俺の取り合いが始まった　どっちがいいか、試してみる？
series_title.en: 年上幼馴染と再会したら、姉妹で俺の取り合いが始まった　どっちがいいか、試してみる？

volumes_registered.title: 年上幼馴染と再会したら、姉妹で俺の取り合いが始まった　どっちがいいか、試してみる？

world_setting.label: Contemporary Japan with a focus on high school life and slice-of-life romance. The setting includes typical urban environments, schools, homes, beaches, and hot springs.

honorifics.policy: Japanese honorifics like -chan, -kun, -san, -nee will be retained to preserve cultural context and character relationships. Explanations will be provided in localization notes if necessary.

name_order.policy: Use Family Given order for Japanese names by default; preserve canonical spelling. Use Given Family only for explicit non-Japanese exceptions.

speaking_to.Shibano Momo: slightly more polite/respectful initially, becomes more casual as he relaxes

keigo.notes: Maintains a casual register, but shows deference or politeness towards older figures or when initially meeting someone. Easily flustered by romantic situations.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: High school male, typically seen in a school uniform or casual attire. Has a generally unassuming posture but can appear flustered or surprised. No specific hair or eye color mentioned, but generally neat.

宮田真太郎.notes: Kind-hearted, easily flustered, somewhat dense regarding romantic advances, responsible, enjoys video games, can be blunt but also caring and thoughtful.

1aea.relationship_to_others: Childhood friend of Shibano Miu and Shibano Momo; best friend of Morishita Ryou; acquaintance of Tachibana Sana.

speaking_to.Shibano Momo: slightly more polite/respectful initially, becomes more casual as he relaxes

keigo_switch.notes: Maintains a casual register, but shows deference or politeness towards older figures or when initially meeting someone. Easily flustered by romantic situations.

1aea.character_arc: Navigating a complicated love triangle with two sisters, realizing his own feelings and the changing dynamics of his relationships.

柴野もも.category: Older childhood friend, primary love interest.

keigo.notes: Generally speaks in a gentle, caring tone, occasionally becoming more direct or playful when teasing Shintarou. Uses 'Shin-chan' consistently.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Black bob haircut, often worn with a soft, elegant style. Favors stylish, form-fitting clothing that accentuates her figure, such as sleeveless knits and tight skirts, or a black bikini. Has a gentle, often smiling expression, and a graceful posture. May wear a pink apron while cooking.

柴野もも.notes: Affectionate, playful, beautiful, kind, slightly ditzy (especially with cooking large quantities), enjoys teasing Shintarou, mature but also innocent and sometimes shy.

1aea.relationship_to_protagonist: Older childhood friend, primary love interest.

keigo_switch.notes: Generally speaks in a gentle, caring tone, occasionally becoming more direct or playful when teasing Shintarou. Uses 'Shin-chan' consistently.

1aea.character_arc: Reconnecting with Shintarou and subtly vying for his attention, exploring her feelings for him as their relationship deepens.

speaking_to.Miyata Shintarou: casual, often bickering, sometimes teasing, uses 'anta' (you)

keigo.notes: Her speech is characterized by a strong tsundere dynamic with Shintarou, often hiding her true feelings behind irritation or anger. Uses 'anta' for Shintarou, indicating familiarity and slight disdain, but also affection.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Long hair, frequently styled in low twin tails adorned with fluffy scrunchies. Wears a school uniform, white knee-high socks, and a light jersey jacket. Her expressions often shift between annoyed, pouting, and secretly pleased. Has an energetic and sometimes clumsy posture.

柴野みう.notes: Tsundere, easily angered/flustered, energetic, competitive, secretly caring, a bit clumsy, diligent (wakes Shintarou), can be naive about romance but also surprisingly bold and direct.

1aea.relationship_to_others: Shibano Momo's younger sister; close friend of Tachibana Sana; classmate of Morishita Ryou.

speaking_to.Miyata Shintarou: casual, often bickering, sometimes teasing, uses 'anta' (you)

keigo_switch.notes: Her speech is characterized by a strong tsundere dynamic with Shintarou, often hiding her true feelings behind irritation or anger. Uses 'anta' for Shintarou, indicating familiarity and slight disdain, but also affection.

1aea.character_arc: Realizing her feelings for Shintarou after Momo's return, becoming more overtly competitive for his attention, and slowly becoming more honest with her emotions.

speaking_to.Tachibana Sana: initially formal, later more casual/friendly due to shared interests

keigo.notes: His speech is often exaggerated and comedic, especially when interacting with girls or discussing romantic/ecchi topics. Uses 'omae' for Shintarou, indicating close friendship.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: High school male, often seen in uniform or casual wear. Has an energetic, sometimes leering expression, and a boisterous posture. No specific hair or eye color mentioned.

森下良.notes: Playful, a bit perverted (especially towards the sisters), enthusiastic, loud, good-natured, an 'otaku' type, enjoys games, acts as a mood-maker.

1aea.relationship_to_others: Classmate of Miyata Shintarou, Shibano Miu, and Tachibana Sana.

speaking_to.Tachibana Sana: initially formal, later more casual/friendly due to shared interests

keigo_switch.notes: His speech is often exaggerated and comedic, especially when interacting with girls or discussing romantic/ecchi topics. Uses 'omae' for Shintarou, indicating close friendship.

1aea.character_arc: Provides comic relief and external commentary on Shintarou's romantic predicaments, acting as a supportive but often inappropriate best friend.

立花サナ.category: Classmate, initially dislikes Shintarou but later tolerates him.

speaking_to.Morishita Ryou: initially dismissive, later more tolerant/friendly due to shared otaku interests

keigo.notes: Her speech is highly varied depending on who she's talking to. Very formal and cold to Shintarou, but extremely warm and clingy to Miu. Her 'love master' dialogue is often over-the-top.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Semi-long hair, often styled with a white ribbon headband. Favors long sleeves even in summer due to fair skin. Her default expression is polite, but can become sharp when displeased or sparkling with affection for Miu. Has a somewhat prim and proper posture.

立花サナ.notes: Initially reserved and wary of Shintarou, but very affectionate and clingy towards Miu. Self-proclaimed 'love master' with extensive theoretical knowledge from anime/manga. Polite, but can be firm, especially towards Morishita.

1aea.relationship_to_protagonist: Classmate, initially dislikes Shintarou but later tolerates him.
1aea.relationship_to_others: Close friend of Shibano Miu; classmate of Miyata Shintarou and Morishita Ryou.

speaking_to.Morishita Ryou: initially dismissive, later more tolerant/friendly due to shared otaku interests

keigo_switch.notes: Her speech is highly varied depending on who she's talking to. Very formal and cold to Shintarou, but extremely warm and clingy to Miu. Her 'love master' dialogue is often over-the-top.

1aea.character_arc: Becoming a close friend to Miu, initially hostile towards Shintarou, but gradually becoming more integrated into the group dynamic, showcasing her 'love master' tendencies.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: High school male, typically seen in a school uniform or casual attire. Has a generally unassuming posture but can appear flustered or surprised. No specific hair or eye color mentioned, but generally neat.
